name: outreach-squad
description: Daily outbound engine: finds leads, runs sequences, handles replies, and posts a digest every day. Simple mode by default, upgrades to Advanced when signals stack.
author: pancake-official

agents.description: Runs the full outbound loop daily: finds 1-3 leads, advances active sequences, handles replies, and posts a digest. Decides simple vs. advanced mode autonomously based on company stage.

required_identities.reason: Finds leads via LinkedIn search, sends connection requests, sends and reads DMs as the user.

optional_vault_secrets.label: Heyreach API key (optional — needed for automated LinkedIn sequences)
Lemlist API key (optional — needed for automated email sequences or LinkedIn if not using Heyreach)
FullEnrich API key (optional — needed for email enrichment in Advanced mode)
Jungler API key (optional — needed to extract post likers/commenters in Advanced mode). Get 10% off: https://www.jungler.ai/?via=francois
Crunchbase API key (optional — needed for funding/firmographic signals in Advanced mode)

crons.description: Daily outbound loop: find leads, advance sequences, handle replies, post digest.
crons.task: Run the full daily outbound loop: find 1–3 leads, advance all active sequences, handle any inbound replies, post the digest. See HEARTBEAT.md for the full procedure.
